Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.reference

Class SchematicFieldReference

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.JavaSourceElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.JavaProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.reference.VariableReference
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.reference.FieldReference
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.reference.SchematicFieldReference
All Implemented Interfaces:
Expression, ExpressionContainer, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, Reference, MemberReference, NameReference, ReferencePrefix, ReferenceSuffix, TypeReferenceContainer, SourceElement, EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, SyntaxElement
public class SchematicFieldReference extends FieldReference implements MemberReference, ReferenceSuffix, TypeReferenceContainer, ExpressionContainer
Field reference.

    • getFirstElement

      public SourceElement getFirstElement()
      Description copied from class: JavaSourceElement
      Finds the source element that occurs first in the source. The default implementation returns this element, which is correct for all terminal program elements, and many non terminals such as statements and prefixed operators.
      Specified by:
      getFirstElement in interface SourceElement
      Overrides:
      getFirstElement in class FieldReference
      Returns:
      the first source element in the syntactical representation of this element, may be equals to this element.
      See Also:
      • JavaSourceElement.toSource()
      • JavaSourceElement.getStartPosition()

      public SourceElement getFirstElementIncludingBlocks()
      Description copied from interface: SourceElement
      Finds the source element that occurs first in the source.
      Specified by:

      Overrides:
      getFirstElementIncludingBlocks in class FieldReference
      Returns:
      the first source element in the syntactical representation of this element, may be equals to this element.
      See Also:
      • SourceElement.getStartPosition()

    • visit

    • match

      public MatchConditions match(SourceData source, MatchConditions matchCond)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramElement
      matches the source "text" (@link SourceData#getSource()) against the pattern represented by this object. In case of a successful match the resulting MatchConditions with the found instantiations of the schemavariables. If the match failed, null is returned instead.
      Specified by:
      match in interface ProgramElement
      Overrides:
      match in class JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
      Parameters:
      source - the SourceData with the program element to match
      matchCond - the MatchConditions found up to this point
      Returns:
      the resulting match conditions or null if the match failed
